storyId.description: Story id the create-loop run was bound to.

contractPath.description: Repo-relative path to the authored loop contract JSON.

smokeExitCode.description: Final observed bounded-smoke exit code. 0 = exit condition met, 2 = budget exhausted — both are valid bounded terminations (the schema dialect cannot express an integer enum, so the 0/2 convention is enforced by the smoke gates' passOn exit-codes [0, 2]).

receiptCount.description: Number of receipt lines emitted across the final bounded smoke run.

budgetsEnforced.description: True when the harness honored the contract iteration cap and wall-clock budget during the verified smoke run.
